stats_fallback.christened: 2025-04-09 (PortMiami — godmother Drew Barrymore, celebrity guest Orlando Bloom, live concert by Gloria Estefan)
stats_fallback.cabins_note: 2,614 cabins including 159 MSC Yacht Club suites, 19 categories, ~65% with balcony, 65 ADA.
stats_fallback.beam: 154 ft (47 m hull waterline); 177 ft / 54 m max including balcony overhangs
stats_fallback.power: 5× Wärtsilä 14V46DF LNG dual-fuel engines (80 MW) + 2× 75 kW Bloom Energy Solid Oxide Fuel Cells + shore power capability
stats_fallback.yacht_club_status: Installed from 2025 delivery. 159 Yacht Club suites with private MSC Yacht Club Restaurant, Top Sail Lounge, Grill & Bar, private pool and sundeck, butler service, and 24-hour concierge.

related.class_notes: World Class. MSC World America is the second ship, sister to MSC World Europa (2022, Mediterranean-based). MSC World Asia is scheduled for November 2026 delivery and MSC World Atlantic for February 2027. All ships are built by Chantiers de l'Atlantique at Saint-Nazaire and share the class-defining Y-shaped aft with floor-to-ceiling glass walls, LNG dual-fuel propulsion, the 11-deck Venom Drop @ The Spiral dry slide, the seven-deck outdoor World Promenade, and full MSC Yacht Club enclaves. MSC World America differs from Europa with: (1) Americas-themed deck names (vs Europa's European cities); (2) new venues debuting — Eataly (the first Eataly at sea), Paxos Greek seafood, All-Stars Sports Bar, The Loft comedy/karaoke; (3) Bloom Energy SOFC fuel cells; (4) slightly higher GT (216,638 vs 215,863); (5) 159 Yacht Club suites (vs Europa's 152); (6) dedicated US-market deployment from PortMiami.

deployment.year_round_2025_onwards: Year-round 7-night alternating Eastern and Western Caribbean round-trips from PortMiami (MSC Miami Cruise Terminal). Saturday turnarounds.
deployment.eastern_caribbean: Miami → Puerto Plata (Dominican Republic) → San Juan (Puerto Rico) → Ocean Cay MSC Marine Reserve (Bahamas) → Miami
deployment.western_caribbean: Miami → Roatán (Honduras) → Costa Maya (Mexico) → Cozumel (Mexico) → Ocean Cay MSC Marine Reserve (Bahamas) → Miami
deployment.current_ais_2026_04_11: Approaching PortMiami, Florida from the northeast (~25.78°N / 79.99°W, ~60 nmi east of Miami), under way at ~9 kn, heading 249° (WSW), draft 9.4 m. ETA Miami 06:30-07:07 UTC. Returning from Ocean Cay for a Saturday 11 April turnaround.

history.delivered: 27 March 2025, Saint-Nazaire (Chantiers de l'Atlantique, yard X34)
history.christened: 9 April 2025, PortMiami. Godmother: Drew Barrymore. Celebrity guest: Orlando Bloom. Live concert: Gloria Estefan. Captain at inaugural: Dino Sagani.
history.2026_03_06_medevac: 6 March 2026 — US Coast Guard medevacked a passenger from MSC World America for a medical emergency. Routine at-sea medevac, no structural incident.

discrepancies_flagged.hallucinations_removed: Previous page claimed 'Cirque du Soleil at Sea' (never on World America — partnership phased out), 'Chef's Garden Kitchen by Niklas Ekstedt' (that's on MSC World Europa, not America), 'La Pescadería' (not on America — Europa has La Pescaderia), 'over 30 dining venues' (unverified; use 19 dining venues per CruiseMapper), 'seven districts' including 'Family Aventura', 'Zen', 'Helios' (unverified district branding — not confirmed in MSC's official materials for World America), and '1,122 feet long' (actual ~1,093 ft / 333.30 m).
discrepancies_flagged.class_placeholder_removed: Previous page had 'exceptional' as placeholder class name in multiple places (intro, Review JSON-LD, stats, image captions, logbook heading). Fixed throughout to 'World Class'.
discrepancies_flagged.guest_count_hallucinations: Previous page had '6,762 guests at double occupancy' (wrong — 6,762 is max), '5,264 guests' (another wrong figure), and '2,200 crew' in stats card. Verified: 5,079 double / 6,762 max, 2,138 crew.
discrepancies_flagged.gt_discrepancy: Previous page had GT 215,863 (the World Europa figure, used incorrectly for World America). MSC's official press release for World America specifies 216,638 GT.
discrepancies_flagged.no_monopoly_partnership: No Monopoly-themed experience on MSC World America. MSC's confirmed onboard brand partnerships are LEGO, Chicco, Guinness World Records, F1, and Swarovski. The kids' programme includes a LEGO Game Show and Guinness World Record Family Quiz.
discrepancies_flagged.beam: 47 m hull waterline vs 54 m max with balcony overhangs. AIS trackers report 54 m because AIS reports maximum beam. MSC press releases quote 154 ft (~47 m). Both are correct for different measurement points.
discrepancies_flagged.duplicate_id_fixed: Previous page had two elements with id='recent-rail-title' (validator error). Renamed the second to 'recent-rail-title-bottom'.
discrepancies_flagged.under_construction_false_positive: Previous page referenced MSC World Asia as 'currently under construction' which triggered the validator's #1322 Under Construction banner heuristic. Rephrased to 'scheduled for November 2026 delivery'.
